title: IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)

jsonLd.title: IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Aurangabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited:
IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIM Bangalore Advisory Limited!
